title: The Shocking Miss Pilgrim
director: George Seaton, Edmund Goulding, John M. Stahl
writer: George Seaton, Ernest Maas, Frederica Sagor Maas
actors: Betty Grable, Dick Haymes, Anne Revere
plot: In the late 1800s, Miss Pilgrim, a young typist, becomes the first female employee at a Boston shipping office. Although the men object to her at first, she soon charms them all, especially the handsome young head of the company. ...
